reference: Hi, when I was showering today, I noticed three small red dots on my breasts. I watched them get bigger in a matter of a minute; they are about the size of a dime and have stopped growing. They look like blood blisters, kind of. They are itchy. I had this happen to me a few years ago. They went away in a few days. Is it something to be concerned about?
text: Hi, am I fine today? I noticed a small red spot on my foot. I actually get the urine around over me. There, at the side of the gown, when I sat down, it looked like blood blisters. There it is. I had this happen to me a few years ago. It was a rare few days. Is it something to be concerned about?
